text.title: Trunk-Based CI Gates Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply the trunk-based-ci-gates methodology end-to-end.

step.name: emit-pre-commit
step.action: Write .pre-commit-config.yaml with ruff (or eslint), format, secret-scan, conventional-commits. No pytest.

step.name: emit-ci-workflow
step.action: Write CI workflow: install, lint, typecheck, unit tests (parallel), build. Move integration to nightly schedule.

step.name: configure-branch-protection
step.action: Apply branch protection via gh api: required reviews >= 1, required status checks (all jobs), linear history, restrict direct pushes.

step.name: verify-required-status
step.action: Run gh api repos/<o>/<r>/branches/main/protection; diff against CI job names; fail if mismatch.

step.name: wire-auto-revert
step.action: Install auto-revert action: on CI red on main, open revert PR within 15 min; tag original author; ping #incidents.

step.name: secret-scan-ci
step.action: Add gitleaks/detect-secrets job to CI; add to required-status list.
